html:
Exclusive to:

Platapine Quills are Items exclusive to the Hamlet DLC which are dropped by Platapines. Three of them are required to craft the Bird Whistle.
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Platapine Quill
40
Dropped by
"bill_quill"
“It's boring.”
–Wilson
“I could probably use this for something.”
–Willow
“Is for teeny diggings.”
–Wolfgang
“It's been separated from its animal.”
–Wendy
“TOOL MADE FROM A FLESHLING ACCESSORY”
–WX-78
“An Ornithorhynchidae quill.”
–Wickerbottom
“What'aya think this is for?”
–Woodie
“Sharp and pointed. Like me.”
–Maxwell
“Surprisingly hardy. Theoretically, it could be used as a tool.”
–Wagstaff
“A skewer fröm the skewerer.”
–Wigfrid
“Watch it! It's sharp.”
–Webber
“Yeouch. Looks sharp!”
–Walani
“It's sharp!”
–Warly
“'tis a part o' tha spiky beastie.”
–Woodlegs
“LIKE QUILLS 'PON THE FRETFUL PLATAPINE”
–Wilba
“Pokey part”
–Wormwood
“You could poke someone's eye out with this.”
–Wheeler
Platapine Quills are Items exclusive to the Hamlet DLC which are dropped by Platapines. Three of them are required to craft the Bird Whistle.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lông Platapine là Vật phẩm dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC được Platapine rơi ra. Ba trong số chúng được yêu cầu để chế tạo Còi Chim.

'''Platapine Quills''' are [[Item]]s exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC which are dropped by [[Platapine]]s. Three of them are required to craft the [[Bird Whistle]].

=={{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Platapine Quill
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Hippopotamoose Antler
|item3 = Flint
|tool = Science Machine
|result = Bird Whistle}}
{{Recipe
|item = Platapine Quill
|tool = Pig Collector
|result = Oinc
|resultcount = 3}}
